name: Team Kamala
subject: Legalize it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Two out of three Americans believe that marijuana should be legal, and this sentiment only grows stronger by the year. With rising support for legalization, it’s clear we need to decriminalize marijuana at the federal level. It’s the smart thing to do. More states are moving to legalize marijuana through ballot initiatives and bills in state legislatures, but it is not enough. This isn’t just a matter of combating outdated and unpopular marijuana laws. It’s a matter of repairing our communities, system, and country. **[TAKE ACTION: Sign the petition to demand to decriminalize marijuana across the country»**](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/legalize-marijuana?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190211-petition-full&source=ema190211-petition-full&t=1&akid=3068%2E5755789%2EsTJc69) | | [Add my name](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/legalize-marijuana?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190211-petition-full&source=ema190211-petition-full&t=2&akid=3068%2E5755789%2EsTJc69)
---
It’s past time that we ALL address the harrowing issue of mass incarceration in our country -- and that starts with marijuana legalization and restorative justice programs in our damaged criminal justice system.
Our system continues to target and imprison young Black and Latinx Americans for low-level, nonviolent drug offenses at high levels. Too many lives and communities have been ruined by regressive policies. This needs to be rectified with a pathway to legalization at the federal level.
Here’s what our fight looks like:
* Introduce and pass legislation to legalize marijuana nationwide.
* Expunge nonviolent marijuana-related offenses from the records of millions of people who have been arrested and incarcerated.
* Create national programs to address addiction treatment and reentry for all formerly incarcerated Americans.

Kamala is a firm believer that we can no longer repeat the same mistakes from our past if we’re going to build a country that works for everyone. That’s the foundation of our campaign. We cannot claim decency, freedom, justice, and equality as our values without reforming this broken system.
**[Add your name if you believe marijuana should be legalized at the federal level.**](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/legalize-marijuana?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190211-petition-full&source=ema190211-petition-full&t=3&akid=3068%2E5755789%2EsTJc69)
| [Add my name](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/legalize-marijuana?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190211-petition-full&source=ema190211-petition-full&t=4&akid=3068%2E5755789%2EsTJc69)
---
Thanks for taking action and fighting for a more free, fair, and just country.
—Team Kamala

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Will you stand FOR this at all costs?
body:
| | Peter, Much of the news lately has been dominated by stories about newly empowered politicians ripping the mask off of their embrace of the culture of death. On Nancy Pelosi’s very first day as Speaker of the House, she sought to roll back pro-life policies. And she made it clear again this week that abortion is one of her top priorities when she brought the CEO of Planned Parenthood as her guest to the State of the Union. I’m sure I don’t need to remind you of what happened the moment secular liberals gained control of New York’s Senate. And other states like Virginia, Rhode Island, and New Mexico are trying to follow its lead by allowing babies to be aborted up to the moment of birth. And they are even allowing babies that have _already been born_ during abortion procedures to struggle for their lives while the parents and doctors debate whether to let them live. In response, Senator Sasse (R-NE) put forth the Born-Alive-Abortion-Survivors-Protection-Act to require medical care for babies born alive during failed abortions. But Senator Patty Murray (D-WA) blocked it. What has come of America?! We cannot allow the lie to continue that some lives just aren’t as valuable as others because of arbitrary standards or personal preferences. That is the logic of slavery. It is profane to suggest that one person could actually own another person and decide whether that person lives or dies. **[This must be stopped. Your donation to My Faith Votes today can make a difference.](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190208apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190212apl01nd&n=1)** It’s absolutely astounding to me to see the people who are cheering, celebrating and congratulating themselves on these laws for their great “progressive” victory. There is nothing healthy or reproductively beneficial about killing a fully developed baby. And while they say it’s a woman’s “right to choose,” they deny the fact that she’ll carry the consequences of her choice for the rest of her life as well. I tell you all of this because we cannot sit on the sidelines. The left is advancing a culture of death and a God-less society. President Trump said it best in his State of the Union address, “Let us work together to build a culture that cherishes innocent life. And let us reaffirm a fundamental truth: all children \-- born and unborn -- are made in the holy image of God.” **_At My Faith Votes, our staff and directors have a plan to launch social media and other digital communication strategies to target pro-lifers and Christians and motivate them to get involved and ACT on their faith._** The mobilization campaign budget for this effort is $185,000 – but those are funds not presently available. Most of our donor partners think of us as only important during election season, and while we are providing critical leadership during that time, we have become a leading conduit for motivating and mobilizing Christians year-round. We can deploy the same effective tactics used during election season **_now_** to impact the deplorable legislative plague spreading across our nation and stop these life-killing bills being put forth. **[Please help us put this strategy into action](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190208apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190212apl01nd&n=2). **For the sake of our faith, our nation, and our children and grandchildren. We must PRAY, and we must ACT. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190208apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190212apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190212apl01nd&n=4)
---

name: Jess Fassler
subject: 30-second update: South Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
Kirsten likes to have fun and can give a heck of a speech.

| | | Hey Peter,

Kirsten just touched down after a [weekend of campaigning](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9622/2684229321/VEsH/ "https://twitter.com/SenGillibrand/status/1094342931236802560") throughout South Carolina, and I wanted to report back to you that**things went great**. As the Associated Press put it, Kirsten[ immersed herself in the state](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a962d/2684229321/VEsE/ "https://www.apnews.com/9c47e70e5d1a49ec801d47e4c41ce301"). From [Main Street market](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a962c/2684229321/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/thehill/status/1094536703862284289") and[ living rooms](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a962f/2684229321/VEsC/ "https://www.thestate.com/news/politics-government/article225916230.html?utm_source=dlvr.it&utm_medium=twitter") to [Kiki's Chicken and Waffles](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a962e/2684229321/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/MegKinnardAP/status/1094315032773623809") and [church](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9629/2684229321/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/SenGillibrand/status/1094688729963352064"), South Carolina Democrats are beginning to learn what we have known for a long time--Kirsten is in this campaign to make a real difference in people's lives, and she will meet them where they live with humility and listen to their challenges so she can fight for their families as hard as she would fight for her own.
---
**This is a community-led campaign --and we need you to be part of it, too. We're not accepting any money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, and we won't have an individual super PAC. [Give now to elect Kirsten and restore courage and compassion to the White House! ](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9628/2684229321/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3NzMtb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2773-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2773-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| [Donate $25](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2773-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2773-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| [Other](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9628/2684229321/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3NzMtb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2773-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
South Carolina Democrats are also learning that Kirsten likes to have fun (see her showing off her outfit at the Urban League of the Upstate "Black Tie and Sneakers" Gala) and can [give a heck of a speech.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9614/2684229321/VEsHBw/ "https://twitter.com/MegKinnardAP/status/1094592691478900736")
**Looking forward** , it will be a big week in Congress, where Kirsten will join Congresswoman Rosa DeLauro to reintroduce the FAMILY Act--the first-ever national proposal for guaranteed paid family and medical leave as an earned benefit. When Kirsten first introduced this bill years ago, Dems and Republicans alike laughed at such an ambitious proposal. Now both parties openly debate not IF we need a national plan but HOW to implement one. Folks,******that is what leadership looks like**. Kirsten started a national debate on this much-needed policy that will help millions of working families struggling to make ends meet with a new baby or aging parent and keep millions of women off the [sticky floor](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9617/2684229321/VEsHBg/ "https://www.csmonitor.com/1993/0713/13122.html") with an endless cycle of low-wage jobs.
**Next weekend** , Kirsten will kick off a multi-state campaign tour that brings her to **New Hampshire on the weekend** and **Iowa on Presidents Day** before **making****more stops in Colorado and Texas** (both March 2020 primary states) before heading**back to New York**. If you haven't yet, take a minute to follow Kirsten on Instagram, Facebook and Twitter for campaign updates from the road. And for more behind-the-scenes takes, follow her [Comms Director Meredith Kelly](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9616/2684229321/VEsHAQ/ "https://twitter.com/meredithk27") and [Traveling Press Secretary Alex Phillips](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9611/2684229321/VEsHAA/ "https://twitter.com/alexandria_gp") on Twitter. (I'm no good at tweeting.)
**In case you missed it** : Check out this [awesome video recap](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9610/2684229321/VEsHAw/ "https://www.facebook.com/KirstenGillibrand/videos/833799513624041/") of last weekend on the trail in New Hampshire. ([Here is the Iowa version](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9613/2684229321/VEsHAg/ "https://www.facebook.com/KirstenGillibrand/videos/2283737324972421/").)
**_In Other News :_**
* Kirsten had a blast taping [this week's Lovett or Leave It](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9612/2684229321/VEsHDQ/ "https://crooked.com/podcast/un-meet-virginia/") in front of a live audience of 3,000. Clearly, she loved it.
* After inviting a [decorated transgender service member](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a961d/2684229321/VEsHDA/ "https://www.huffingtonpost.com/entry/kirsten-gillibrand-to-bring-transgender-navy-lieutenant-commander-to-sotu_us_5c5857a8e4b00187b5535d31") to the State of the Union as her guest last Tuesday, Kirsten announced that [she reintroduced her bipartisan bill to allow transgender military service](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a961c/2684229321/VEsEBQ/ "https://thehill.com/policy/defense/428996-gillibrand-introduces-bipartisan-bill-to-allow-transgender-military-service"), which she last introduced with the late Senator McCain. This bill would protect transgender troops from the president's hateful discrimination that not only is morally wrong, but harms military readiness in the same way "don't ask, don't tell" did.
* Speaking of the State of the Union, [Kirsten went viral](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a961f/2684229321/VEsEBA/ "https://twitter.com/SenGillibrand/status/1092997854090559489") with this take while walking off the House floor on Trump's riff on women's job numbers.
* And finally, another [reminder here](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a961e/2684229321/VEsEBw/ "https://twitter.com/SenGillibrand/status/1094698769722081280") that Kirsten is a class act as she once again welcomed another strong Democratic woman senator to the presidential primary field and [yet again here](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9619/2684229321/VEsEBg/ "https://twitter.com/MegKinnardAP/status/1094304014156611585"), when she defended another from a sexist and racist smear from President Trump.

As always, thanks for all you do. We are building something special here, and I am glad you are a part of it with us.

Jess
**P.S.** While in South Carolina, [Kirsten sat down with Jaime Harrison](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a9618/2684229321/VEsEAQ/ "https://twitter.com/harrisonjaime/status/1094304630123708416"), who is running for Senate against Republican Senator Lindsey Graham, who led the pro-Kavanaugh push on the Judiciary Committee. Jaime is a great candidate and worthy of your support. Check out [his launch video here](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9769ef/2ae112ef/172e973e/357a961b/2684229321/VEsEAA/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hX2PKlmFie8") and send him a few bucks if you can.

subject: Sheriffs Warn ICE Could Be Forced To Release 8,300 Criminal Aliens
body:
"America’s sheriffs are warning Congress to stop a proposed backroom deal." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a9bad39595&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Sheriffs Warn ICE Could Be Forced To Release 8,300 Criminal Aliens**

“America’s sheriffs are warning Congress to stop a proposed backroom deal that would institute a ceiling on the number of illegal immigrants that U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) can detain,” David Krayden writes in _The Daily Caller_.

“Capping the number of detention beds utilized by ICE not only jeopardizes the integrity of the immigration system, but would cripple ICE’s ability to detain criminal aliens and other aliens who pose a risk to public safety or are a flight risk,” the sheriffs say. More than 8,300 criminally charged or convicted individuals could be put back on the streets.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b69c041d76&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “We are at wits end on this,” said Sheriff Thomas M. Hodgson of Bristol County, Massachusetts, about efforts by House and Senate Democrats to cut funding for a border wall and ICE detention facilities. “‘This really is a catastrophe,’ he said of the anti-Trump proposal backed by Democrats,” Paul Bedard reports in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b73051bace&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Hodgson said that his jail holds some 200 criminal illegal immigrants and he bluntly said that if any were to be freed, they would go out and commit more crimes.”
---
|
---
| “Another large group of migrants are in custody after showing up at a remote border crossing in southwestern New Mexico,” _[The Associated Press](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=023cfb5f65&e=3ee4985eea)_ reports. “U.S. Customs and Border Protection said the 330 Central Americans were apprehended early Monday at the Antelope Wells port of entry, 122 miles (197 kilometers) west of El Paso, Texas. This marks the second large group to be arrested near the port in less than a week.”
---
|
---
| “As President Trump said in his recent State of the Union Address, we must invest in the industries of the future—and few industries are more important than [artificial intelligence],” [Deputy U.S. Chief Technology Officer Michael Kratsios](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b75420e4dc&e=3ee4985eea) writes in _Wired_. With an executive order yesterday, President Trump launched the American AI Initiative. “Ultimately, we will win the race for AI, and we will do it without compromising our American values,” Kratsios writes.
---
|
---
| In _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89330983e8&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Tod Lindberg writes that President Trump is serious about diplomacy with North Korea. The Trump Administration’s approach “compares favorably with the one the Obama administration took toward Iran, never demanding an end to nuclear programs and settling for a deal that came nowhere close. When Mr. Trump ditched the Iran deal before engaging North Korea, he signaled his commitment to stricter terms in his talks with Mr. Kim.”
---
|
